productcard.faq_q1: How do I get the card code?
productcard.faq_a1: The card code (serial number + PIN) appears immediately on the "Purchase History" page after successful payment, and can be copied directly on the website.
productcard.faq_q2: Why is the selling price lower than the value printed on the card?
productcard.faq_a2: We source cards directly from the issuer at a discount, and pass that discount on to customers in the selling price.
productcard.faq_q3: What if the card is defective or already used?
productcard.faq_a3: Contact support immediately with your order code — our support team will check and exchange/refund if the fault is on our end.
productcard.fraud_note: Payment and code delivery are protected by SoftwarePays' anti-fraud system.

steamwallet.heading: Steam Wallet Top-up Card (Global/VN)
steamwallet.description: Steam Wallet cards are used to top up your Steam account balance, letting you buy games, in-game items (CS:GO, Dota 2...), and software on the Steam platform easily and safely. The code is sent automatically right after successful payment.
steamwallet.out_of_stock_notice: Steam Wallet cards are currently out of stock. Please check back later!
steamwallet.no_region_match: No cards match the selected filters.
steamwallet.guide_heading: How to Redeem a Steam Card
steamwallet.guide_step1: Step 1: Log in to your Steam account on the app or website.
steamwallet.guide_step2: Step 2: Click your avatar in the top-right corner and select "View my wallet".
steamwallet.guide_step3: Step 3: Select "Redeem a Steam Gift Card or Wallet Code".
steamwallet.guide_step4: Step 4: Enter the code you received from the store into the "Steam Wallet Code" field and click Continue.
steamwallet.guide_note: Note: Steam Wallet cards from this shop can be redeemed on any Global or Vietnam region Steam account. Steam will automatically convert the currency (if applicable) to VND at the current exchange rate.

support.faq_subtitle: The most commonly asked questions from customers
support.faq_q1: How do I get my Code after purchase?
support.faq_a1: After successful payment, the system will automatically deliver the Code/Key directly on screen, and also save it in the "Transaction History" section of your Account Settings page.
support.faq_q2: I topped up via MoMo but haven't seen the balance updated?
support.faq_a2: MoMo usually credits automatically within 1-3 minutes. If it's been over 5 minutes, please message our support Zalo directly with a screenshot of the receipt for immediate handling.
support.faq_a3: SoftwarePays guarantees a 100% refund or immediate Key replacement if the Key/Code fails to activate due to a system error (Duplicate, Invalid). No warranty for wrong platform/region cases.
support.faq_q4: Does the shop help find games not listed on the website?
support.faq_a4: Yes! If you need any game title not available on the site, contact our Fanpage — staff will check prices from foreign distributors and get back to you with the best price.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Welcome to SoftwarePays. Your privacy is extremely important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.s1_p1: When you create an account, subscribe to our newsletter, or use the service via Social Login (Google Login, GitHub), we only collect the basic information you authorize, including:
privacy.s1_li4: Device IP address (For security purposes and unusual login alerts)
privacy.s1_notice: We absolutely have no access to your Google account password or any other personal data on third-party platforms.
privacy.s2_p1: We use your information for the following transparent purposes:
privacy.s2_li1: Account authentication: Identifying and managing your account on the SoftwarePays system.
privacy.s2_li2: Transactions: Sending invoices, order information, and licensed keys (Digital Products) you have successfully purchased.
privacy.s2_li3: Customer protection: Providing proactive security features (sending OTP codes via email, alerting unusual device logins).
privacy.s2_li4: Support: Contacting you to resolve complaints, warranty support, or refunds.
privacy.s3_p1: We treat the protection of your personal data as if it were our own asset. SoftwarePays applies strict technical and organizational measures:
privacy.s3_li1: Using SSL (Secure Sockets Layer) encryption for all website traffic.
privacy.s3_li2: Your password is securely one-way encrypted using the Bcrypt algorithm.
privacy.s3_li3: Applying Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) and payment OTP verification to prevent risk.
privacy.s3_p2: We commit to never selling, trading, renting, or sharing your personal information with any third party for commercial purposes, except to authorized legal authorities when required.
privacy.s4_p1: You own your data. You have full rights to access, edit your personal profile, or request the complete deletion of your account and all transaction data from the SoftwarePays system at any time by contacting customer support.
privacy.contact_cta: If you have any questions about how we handle data, please contact:
terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By registering an account and using the services at SoftwarePays, you agree to comply with the following Terms of Service. Please read carefully before using.
terms.s1_p1: Security responsibility: You are fully responsible for keeping your login information secure. We recommend enabling Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) in your account settings.
terms.s1_p2: No account sharing: Sharing an account among multiple users for profit or to bypass protection systems is strictly prohibited.
terms.s1_p3: Third-party login: When using Google Login, you agree to grant us access to basic information (Name, Email, Avatar) to create and manage your account.
terms.s2_p1: Digital copyright: All products (Game Keys, Wallet Codes) on SoftwarePays are digital products. You will receive the code immediately after payment.
terms.s2_p2: Refund policy: Once a Key has been successfully delivered to your inventory, we do not support refunds under any circumstances unless the error is verified to be from SoftwarePays' system or the publisher.
terms.s2_p3: Warranty: Keys are only warrantied if defective (Invalid, Duplicated) at the time of activation, and must be reported to customer support within 24 hours of purchase.
terms.s3_p1: Any interference with our servers, hacking, exploiting bugs, or using illegal funds (stolen credit cards, money laundering) for payment will result in your account being permanently banned without prior notice. We will also cooperate with and provide data to relevant authorities upon investigation requests.
terms.s4_p1: SoftwarePays reserves the right to change, modify, add, or remove any part of these Terms at any time. Changes take effect immediately upon posting on the website without prior notice. Your continued use of the website after Terms changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of those changes.
terms.contact_cta: If you have any questions about the Terms of Service, please contact customer support.

product.kinguin_faq_1_q: How do I receive my key/product code after purchase?
product.kinguin_faq_1_a: As soon as payment succeeds, your key will appear on your order detail page (under "My Orders"). You can copy the code and activate it right away on the matching platform (Steam, Origin, Epic Games, Battle.net...).
product.kinguin_faq_2_q: How long does it take to receive the key after payment?
product.kinguin_faq_2_a: Most orders are delivered instantly (under 1 minute) after payment succeeds. In rare cases the provider's system is slower — the key will appear on your order once available, usually within a few minutes.
product.kinguin_faq_3_q: Which regions can this product be activated in?
product.kinguin_faq_3_a: Most products are "Region Free" (can be activated worldwide, including Vietnam), unless the product description states a specific region lock. Please read the description above carefully before buying to make sure it matches your account.
product.kinguin_faq_4_a: SoftwarePays supports MoMo, ZaloPay, VNPay, and domestic bank transfer — no international Visa/Mastercard needed.
product.kinguin_faq_5_q: What if the key is faulty or already used?
product.kinguin_faq_5_a: All keys are issued from trusted provider systems and delivered only once for your order. If you run into an activation issue, please contact support right away (Messenger/Zalo/Email in the footer) with your order number so we can check and arrange a key replacement or refund per policy.
product.esimGuide.toc_process: How to buy, activate and use an eSIM for :destination
product.esimGuide.toc_step1: Step 1: Make sure your device supports eSIM
product.esimGuide.toc_step2: Step 2: Choose the right plan for your needs
product.esimGuide.toc_step3: Step 3: Pay & receive your QR code
product.esimGuide.toc_notes: Tips for using a travel eSIM
product.esimGuide.intro_body: SoftwarePays offers travel eSIMs for :destination and many other destinations, giving you an internet connection the moment you land — no physical SIM swap or airport SIM shopping needed.
product.esimGuide.benefit1_body: Your QR code and activation code appear on your order right after payment succeeds — no waiting for a physical SIM to ship.
product.esimGuide.benefit2_body: Keep your main SIM for calls, and add the eSIM just for data abroad on dual-SIM capable devices.
product.esimGuide.benefit3_body: Many data plans by country and region, with a range of validity periods to fit any trip.
product.esimGuide.benefit4_body: Supports MoMo, ZaloPay, VNPay and bank transfer — no international Visa/Mastercard needed.
product.esimGuide.process_heading: How to buy, activate and use an eSIM for :destination
product.esimGuide.step1_heading: Step 1: Make sure your device supports eSIM
product.esimGuide.step1_body: Most Apple, Samsung and Google devices from around 2018-2019 onward support eSIM. Your device also needs to be carrier-unlocked to install and use an eSIM. See the compatibility checker above.
product.esimGuide.step2_heading: Step 2: Choose the right plan for your needs
product.esimGuide.step2_body: In the plan picker above, choose the plan type (fixed data or daily data), the number of days, and the data volume that fits your trip.
product.esimGuide.step3_heading: Step 3: Pay & receive your QR code
product.esimGuide.step3_body: Add the plan to your cart or click "Buy now", then pay via MoMo/ZaloPay/VNPay/bank transfer. Your QR code and activation code will appear right on your order detail page.
product.esimGuide.step4_body: Go to Settings > Cellular on your device, choose "Add eSIM plan", then scan the QR code to activate. Install it before departure while your device still has a stable Wi-Fi/data connection.
product.esimGuide.notes_heading: Tips for using a travel eSIM
product.esimGuide.note1: Once you arrive, go to Settings and set the newly installed eSIM as your primary cellular data line.
product.esimGuide.note2: Keep your main SIM turned on if you still need to receive calls or OTP codes on your main number.
product.esimGuide.note3: Check your remaining data and expiry date in your device's Settings to avoid interruptions mid-trip.
product.esimGuide.note4: Download offline maps and any apps you'll need before departure to save data.
product.esimGuide.note5: If the eSIM doesn't connect after arrival, try toggling airplane mode or restarting your device.
product.esimGuide.faq1_a: An eSIM (embedded SIM) is a digital SIM built into your device. Instead of inserting a physical SIM, you just scan a QR code to activate your plan.
product.esimGuide.faq2_q: How do I activate the eSIM after purchase?
product.esimGuide.faq2_a: After payment, the QR code and activation code appear on your order detail page. Go to Settings > Cellular on your device, choose "Add eSIM plan", then scan the QR code to activate.
product.esimGuide.faq3_q: Does the eSIM support calls and texting?
product.esimGuide.faq3_a: SoftwarePays' travel eSIM plans currently support data only — no voice calls or SMS.
product.esimGuide.faq4_q: What happens if I run out of data?
product.esimGuide.faq4_a: It depends on the plan's policy (see "Selected plan details" above): some plans throttle your speed, while others stop connecting until you buy a new plan or the plan expires.
product.esimGuide.faq5_a: See the compatibility checker above. In general, most Apple, Samsung and Google devices from around 2018-2019 onward support eSIM.
